summary: Iteration 11 - All 19 backend tests pass. Web-client served correctly at /api/web/. Notification system (Web Push, Evolution API) working. Fixed missing web_push_subscription column in users table.
critical_code_review_comments: Database migration issue: web_push_subscription column was defined in models.py but missing from database - FIXED by adding column via ALTER TABLE
All notification endpoints properly handle missing Evolution API config gracefully
Web Push VAPID keys are correctly configured and returned
Public booking flow works correctly with 4-step wizard (Service -> Date -> Time -> Data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All notification system features tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration11_notifications.py cover: health check, VAPID public key, web push subscribe/unsubscribe, Evolution API status/setup (graceful handling when not configured), web-client serving (HTML, sw.js, assets), barbershop public-info, appointments with notification triggers (create/confirm/cancel), send-reminders endpoint, public booking with notification. Database fix applied: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN web_push_subscription TEXT. Evolution API endpoints return graceful errors when EVOLUTION_API_URL and EVOLUTION_API_KEY are empty in .env.

tested_features.Evolution graceful handling: PASS - No crash when config missing
tested_features.GET /api/barbershop/public-info: PASS - Returns barbershop info without auth
tested_features.POST /api/public/book: PASS - Creates public booking, triggers notification

database_fix_applied: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN web_push_subscription TEXT - Column was defined in models.py but missing from database
mocked_apis_note: Evolution API endpoints are implemented but EVOLUTION_API_URL and EVOLUTION_API_KEY are empty in .env - they gracefully handle missing config (no crash, returns {connected: false})
